reasoning: After reviewing the Comments History section as required by protocol, I found a critical FRAUD ALERT note dated Jan 15, 2026. The internal staff note indicates: Customer has 11 refunds in 73 days with ALL claims being 'item not received' but tracking confirms delivery. Total refunded: $1742.73 with an 85% refund rate. The note explicitly states 'DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately.' Although the current claim is 'Wrong size/color sent' (different from previous 'item not received' claims), the established pattern of fraudulent behavior and the explicit instruction to escalate to Loss Prevention requires this request to be escalated rather than approved or denied at my level.
